name: feat-07-comment-threads
initialPrompt: We need inline comment threads on documents, like Google Docs. Users should be able to highlight any text passage and leave a comment, reply in a thread, resolve the thread when addressed, and @mention teammates. Comments should show in a sidebar panel with links back to the highlighted text. Add email notifications when someone replies to your thread or mentions you. Also show the comment count in the document list view.

blocks.text: Enable collaborative review via inline threaded comments anchored to document text
successCriteria: email notification delivered within 60 s of reply

blocks.title: Implement text-range selection and comment anchor creation
acceptance: user can highlight text and click 'Comment'
anchor position stored as character offset range
anchor re-rendered correctly after minor edits

blocks.title: Build comment sidebar panel linked to document anchors
acceptance: sidebar shows comments sorted by position
clicking comment highlights anchor in document

blocks.title: Implement threaded replies within a comment
acceptance: reply count shown on collapsed thread

blocks.title: Add resolve/unresolve thread action
acceptance: resolution logged with timestamp and user

blocks.title: Implement @mention and email notification for replies and mentions

blocks.description: Comment anchors may drift or break after large document restructuring
blocks.mitigation: Store anchors with surrounding context hashes; re-anchor on best-match fallback

blocks.question: Should public-shared documents allow anonymous comments, or only authenticated users?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same risk (anchor drift) but description and mitigation expanded in revision; id changed. AC-13 fallback must map risk-anchor-drift to risk-anchor-drift-v2.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'comment' and 'document' with task-comment-sidebar. A comment on task-comment-sidebar must re-attach to task-comment-sidebar (id preserved), NOT this new count-badge task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-comment-data-model inserted second (shifts all subsequent positions); task-doc-list-comment-count added; risk-anchor-drift id changed. Naive positional scheme loses alignment for task-text-highlight-anchor onward. Denominator is 7.
